stemHtml: Where on the power-required/power-available graph can you find the speed for best range?

options.a: At the point where the power-required curve intersects the power-available curve.
options.b: By drawing a tangent from the starting point of the power-required curve down to the power-required curve itself.
options.c: At the lowest point on the power-required curve.
options.d: By drawing a tangent from the origin of the graph up to the power-required curve.
